textByHashes.2cbc49242ad32d1912044ac74281a1d8e4224a6c: Oh, by the way, I really like that outfit of yours!
textByHashes.f8dc2382a8cd9440b32b9bfa009880fe6ae4d9ce: What can I do for you, human?
textByHashes.a144cc2f4bf59221bd4a195df6a32925ed9c6d50: Can I help you with anything?
textByHashes.dbcad199c52d48b83a3fbbda6d896c35926cbeac: What did you need of the Purple Pewter?
textByHashes.f81408ee00fdfa74cf53a4b5d5724e2b4b7f7848: Is there anything you need assistance with?
textByHashes.7d1db62e3f8e0bb23c31071f5d2090259b1e739c: And what can I do for you?
textByHashes.9276733e80bbfae9560342416d254361a24d3f7a: I am the head secretary of the Purple Pewter.
textByHashes.0c7a8c8cc4f6551e8003b124e7251b8b097f3869: I said, the Purple Pewter. Together with the other companies, we rule Keldagrim and the dwarven realm.
textByHashes.35b99be0bc3890a7b049f9721a642c7e02ef991b: These are the offices of the Purple Pewter.
textByHashes.42f34a846b4c446595b75022ace7a92999f174dc: This is the official residence of the Purple Pewter.
textByHashes.c5a245a76b4c75d77ea8e53b6f2a702afc49cb1a: Why, you are in the headquarters of the Purple Pewter.
textByHashes.c51b2d37f0a6f2d9dc26f7e8c90c8c60e81711da: We share this floor of the palace with the other companies of the Consortium. And trade with them on the Trade Octagon.
textByHashes.67251bf14bca94c19c65377279336a931e237cd3: See those traders out there, just out the door? They're all standing in the Trade Octagon. There's an awful lot of trade going on in the palace, you know.
textByHashes.ffab49546a46af2d1e82185d63b73d402ff57cd6: You will have to find that out on your own, I'm afraid. I do have more work to do.
